Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=draft}}[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|12=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=draft}}[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|12=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=draft}}[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|12=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=draft}}[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|12=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=draft}}[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|12=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. File:塚廻り1号墳出土 埴輪 盾持ち人.JPG|No. 1 Kofun: Shield-Bearing Figure
{{small|Exhibited at the Gunma Archaeological Center.}} File:塚廻り1号古墳出土 埴輪 靫.JPG|No. 1 Kofun: Quiver File:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|No. 3 Kofun: Seated Male File:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の女子.JPG|No. 3 Kofun: Seated Female File:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 盾.JPG|No. 3 Kofun: Shield File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 跪座の男子.JPG|Kneeling Male File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|Seated Male File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀を持つ女子.JPG|Female Holding a Sword File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる女子.JPG|Female Raising Left Hand File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 坏を持つ女子.JPG|Female Holding a Cup File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 捧げ持つ男子.JPG|Male Holding an Offering File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-1.JPG|Male Raising Left Hand File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-1.JPG|Decorative Horse File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-2.JPG|Male Raising Left Hand File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-2.JPG|Decorative Horse File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-1.JPG|Sword File:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-2.JPG|Sword == Cultural Properties == === Important Cultural Property (National Designation) === * Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group (archaeological materials) - Details below. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} {{citation needed|Tsumakairi Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ōta, Gunma]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun Clusters]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[Category:Tsukamawari Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[en:Tsumakairi Kofun]]

{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{draft categories| }} {{citation needed|Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} {{citation needed|Tsumakairi Kofun}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ōta, Gunma]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun Clusters]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[Category:Tsukamawari Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[en:Tsumakairi Kofun]]

revision.text:
{{混同|塚廻古墳}} {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[ファイル:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|塚廻り4号墳 埴輪群（復元）}}]] '''塚廻り古墳群'''（つかまわりこふんぐん、塚廻古墳群）は、[[群馬県]][[太田市]]龍舞町にある[[古墳群]][[大塚初重]]・[[小林三郎 (考古学者)|小林三郎]]・熊野正也 編『日本古墳大辞典』[[東京堂出版]]、1989年、373-374頁。。4号墳は[[群馬県指定文化財一覧#史跡|群馬県指定史跡]]に指定され、古墳群出土品は国の[[重要文化財]]に指定されている。 現在では、4号墳は3号墳前方部とともに古墳公園として復元整備されている[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html　塚廻り古墳群第4号古墳　太田市]。 == 一覧 == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+塚廻り古墳群の一覧 |- ! 古墳名 ||規模 || 形状 || 備考 |- | 1号墳4号墳北北西約300mの位置に所在 || 26.1m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 削平 |- | 2号墳4号墳北西約300mの位置に所在|| 24m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 削平 |- | 3号墳4号墳北に所在|| {{Sdash}} || 帆立貝型古墳 || 一部保存 |- | 4号墳|| 22.5m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 復元、県史跡 |- | 5号墳4号墳南南西約90mの位置に所在|| 16m || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 6号墳4号墳北西約290mの位置に所在、2号墳のすぐ南|| 19m || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 7号墳4号墳北北西約200mの位置に所在|| 20m || 円墳 || 削平 |- | 8号墳 || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 9号墳 || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 10号墳4号墳南の近接地の地表下に所在|| {{Sdash}} || 帆立貝型古墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 11号墳4号墳南西の近接地の地表下に所在 || 16.1m || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 12号墳4号墳西の近接地の地表下に所在 || 9.5m || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 13号墳4号墳北西の近接地の地表下に所在 || {{Sdash}} || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |} == 画像 == 注記以外は群馬県立歴史博物館企画展示時に撮影。 ファイル:塚廻り1号墳出土 埴輪 盾持ち人.JPG|1号墳 盾持ち人
{{small|群馬県埋蔵文化財調査センター発掘情報館展示。}} ファイル:塚廻り1号古墳出土 埴輪 靫.JPG|1号墳 靫 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|3号墳 倚座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の女子.JPG|3号墳 倚座の女子 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 盾.JPG|3号墳 盾 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 跪座の男子.JPG|跪座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|倚座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀を持つ女子.JPG|大刀を持つ女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる女子.JPG|左手を挙げる女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 坏を持つ女子.JPG|坏を持つ女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 捧げ持つ男子.JPG|捧げ持つ男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-1.JPG|左手を挙げる男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-1.JPG|飾り馬 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-2.JPG|左手を挙げる男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-2.JPG|飾り馬 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-1.JPG|大刀 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-2.JPG|大刀 == 文化財 == === 重要文化財（国指定） === * 上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪（考古資料） - 明細は以下。所有者は国（文化庁）、群馬県立歴史博物館保管。1985年（昭和60年）6月6日指定{{国指定文化財等データベース|201|10022|上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪}} ** 第1号墳出土 *** 盾持男子像 1箇 ** 第3号墳出土 *** 女子倚像 1箇 *** 盾 2箇 ** 第4号墳出土 *** 女子像 2箇 *** 馬 1箇 *** 大刀（基台共） 2箇 ** 附指定 *** 人物残欠 26箇分 *** 馬残欠 3箇分 *** 大刀残欠 9箇分 *** 靱残欠 2箇分 *** 盾残欠 5箇分 *** 家残欠 1箇分 *** 基台 残欠共 一括 *** 円筒埴輪 残欠共 一括 === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 塚廻古墳群第4号古墳 - 1977年（昭和52年）9月20日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == {{commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{国指定文化財等データベース|201|10022|上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html 塚廻り古墳群第4号古墳] - 太田市ホームページ {{リダイレクトの所属カテゴリ |redirect1=塚廻り4号墳 |1-1=群馬県指定史跡 }} {{デフォルトソート:つかまわりこふんくん}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:太田市の歴史]] [[Category:群馬県の重要文化財]] [[Category:古墳群]]

revision.text:
{{混同|塚廻古墳}} {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[ファイル:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|塚廻り4号墳 埴輪群（復元）}}]] '''塚廻り古墳群'''（つかまわりこふんぐん、塚廻古墳群）は、[[群馬県]][[太田市]]龍舞町にある[[古墳群]][[大塚初重]]・[[小林三郎 (考古学者)|小林三郎]]・熊野正也 編『日本古墳大辞典』[[東京堂出版]]、1989年、373-374頁。。4号墳は[[群馬県指定文化財一覧#史跡|群馬県指定史跡]]に指定され、古墳群出土品は国の[[重要文化財]]に指定されている。 現在では、4号墳は3号墳前方部とともに古墳公園として復元整備されている[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html　塚廻り古墳群第4号古墳　太田市]。 == 一覧 == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+塚廻り古墳群の一覧 |- ! 古墳名 ||規模 || 形状 || 備考 |- | 1号墳4号墳北北西約300mの位置に所在 || 26.1m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 削平 |- | 2号墳4号墳北西約300mの位置に所在|| 24m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 削平 |- | 3号墳4号墳北に所在|| {{Sdash}} || 帆立貝型古墳 || 一部保存 |- | 4号墳|| 22.5m || 帆立貝型古墳 || 復元、県史跡 |- | 5号墳4号墳南南西約90mの位置に所在|| 16m || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 6号墳4号墳北西約290mの位置に所在、2号墳のすぐ南|| 19m || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 7号墳4号墳北北西約200mの位置に所在|| 20m || 円墳 || 削平 |- | 8号墳 || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 9号墳 || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || 削平 |- | 10号墳4号墳南の近接地の地表下に所在|| {{Sdash}} || 帆立貝型古墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 11号墳4号墳南西の近接地の地表下に所在 || 16.1m || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 12号墳4号墳西の近接地の地表下に所在 || 9.5m || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |- | 13号墳4号墳北西の近接地の地表下に所在 || {{Sdash}} || 円墳 || 埋め戻し保存 |} == 画像 == 注記以外は群馬県立歴史博物館企画展示時に撮影。 ファイル:塚廻り1号墳出土 埴輪 盾持ち人.JPG|1号墳 盾持ち人
{{small|群馬県埋蔵文化財調査センター発掘情報館展示。}} ファイル:塚廻り1号古墳出土 埴輪 靫.JPG|1号墳 靫 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|3号墳 倚座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の女子.JPG|3号墳 倚座の女子 ファイル:塚廻り3号古墳出土 埴輪 盾.JPG|3号墳 盾 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 跪座の男子.JPG|跪座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 倚座の男子.JPG|倚座の男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀を持つ女子.JPG|大刀を持つ女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる女子.JPG|左手を挙げる女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 坏を持つ女子.JPG|坏を持つ女子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 捧げ持つ男子.JPG|捧げ持つ男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-1.JPG|左手を挙げる男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-1.JPG|飾り馬 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 左手を挙げる男子-2.JPG|左手を挙げる男子 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 飾り馬-2.JPG|飾り馬 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-1.JPG|大刀 ファイル:塚廻り4号古墳出土 埴輪 大刀-2.JPG|大刀 == 文化財 == === 重要文化財（国指定） === * 上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪（考古資料） - 明細は以下。所有者は国（文化庁）、群馬県立歴史博物館保管。1985年（昭和60年）6月6日指定{{国指定文化財等データベース|201|10022|上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪}} ** 第1号墳出土 *** 盾持男子像 1箇 ** 第3号墳出土 *** 女子倚像 1箇 *** 盾 2箇 ** 第4号墳出土 *** 女子像 2箇 *** 馬 1箇 *** 大刀（基台共） 2箇 ** 附指定 *** 人物残欠 26箇分 *** 馬残欠 3箇分 *** 大刀残欠 9箇分 *** 靱残欠 2箇分 *** 盾残欠 5箇分 *** 家残欠 1箇分 *** 基台 残欠共 一括 *** 円筒埴輪 残欠共 一括 === 群馬県指定文化財 === * 史跡 ** 塚廻古墳群第4号古墳 - 1977年（昭和52年）9月20日指定{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf 群馬県内の県指定文化財一覧]}}（群馬県ホームページ）。。 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == {{commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{国指定文化財等データベース|201|10022|上野塚廻り古墳群出土埴輪}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html 塚廻り古墳群第4号古墳] - 太田市ホームページ {{リダイレクトの所属カテゴリ |redirect1=塚廻り4号墳 |1-1=群馬県指定史跡 }} {{デフォルトソート:つかまわりこふんくん}} [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:太田市の歴史]] [[Category:群馬県の重要文化財]] [[Category:古墳群]]

{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, {{ill|Ōta, Gunma|ja|太田市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta, Gunma|qq=}}, Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|塚廻り古墳群|version=96110307|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ōta, Gunma]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun Clusters]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[en:Tsumakairi Kofun]]

{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|塚廻り古墳群|version=96110307|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ōta, Gunma]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun Clusters]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[en:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[Category:Kofun clusters]] [[Category:太田市の歴史]] [[Category:群馬県の古墳]] [[Category:群馬県の重要文化財]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Fixed Kofun templates
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[Important Cultural Properties of Japan]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|塚廻り古墳群|version=96110307|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun in Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[Category:History of Ota, Gunma]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property of Japan in Gunma prefecture]] {{Commons category|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Owned by the national government (Agency for Cultural Affairs), preserved at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|塚廻り古墳群|version=96110307|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[Category:History of Ota, Gunma]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property of Japan in Gunma prefecture]] {{Commons category|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}}

Designated on June 6, 1985.{{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} ** From No. 1 Kofun: *** Shield-Bearing Male Figure (1) ** From No. 3 Kofun: *** Seated Female Figure (1) *** Shields (2) ** From No. 4 Kofun: *** Female Figures (2) *** Horse (1) *** Swords (with stands, 2) ** Su11lementary Designations: *** Human fragments (26) *** Horse fragments (3) *** Sword fragments (9) *** Quiver fragments (2) *** Shield fragments (5) *** House fragment (1) *** Base fragments (including whole bases) *** Cylindrical haniwa (including fragments) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Historic Site: ** Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun - Designated on September 20, 1977.{{PDFlink|[https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf List of Prefecture-Designated Cultural Properties]}} (Gunma Prefecture Homepage). == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} * {{National Cultural Properties Database|201|10022|Haniwa from Tsukamawari Kofun Group}} * [https://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunkazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage {{Redirect Category|redirect1=Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun|1-1=Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Sites}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|塚廻り古墳群|version=96110307|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Tsukamawari Kofun Group]] [[sn:Tsumakairi Kofun]] [[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] [[Category:History of Ota, Gunma]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property of Japan in Gunma prefecture]] {{Commons category|Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)}} [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|qid=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|qid=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|qid=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! Kofun Name || Size || Shape || Notes |- | No. 1 KofunLocated about 300 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 26.1 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 2 KofunLocated about 300 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 24 m || Scallop-shaped || Leveled |- | No. 3 KofunLocated north of No. 4 Kofun. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Partially preserved |- | No. 4 Kofun || 22.5 m || Scallop-shaped || Restored, Prefectural Historic Site |- | No. 5 KofunLocated about 90 m south-southwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 16 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 6 KofunLocated about 290 m northwest of No. 4 Kofun, just south of No. 2 Kofun. || 19 m || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 7 KofunLocated about 200 m north-northwest of No. 4 Kofun. || 20 m || Circular || Leveled |- | No. 8 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 9 Kofun || {{Sdash}} || {{Sdash}} || Leveled |- | No. 10 KofunLocated just south of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Scallop-shaped || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 11 KofunLocated just southwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 16.1 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 12 KofunLocated just west of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || 9.5 m || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |- | No. 13 KofunLocated just northwest of No. 4 Kofun, beneath the surface. || {{Sdash}} || Circular || Backfilled for preservation |} == Images == Unless otherwise noted, images were taken during exhibitions at the Gunma Prefectural Museum of History. [[commons:Category:Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)]][[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|qid=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! [[sn:commons:Category:Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)]][[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|WD=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ ! [[sn:commons:Category:Tsukamawari Kofun Group (Ota)]][[ja:塚廻り古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Ota|WD=Q386179}}|coordinates={{Coord|36.285389|N|139.423861|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18337361]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=Not to be confused with {{ill|11|塚廻古墳|1=Tsukamawari Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamawari Kofun|qq=}} [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:03, 16 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Coord|36|17|07.4|N|139|25|25.9|E|region:JP|display=title}} [[File:塚廻り古墳 - panoramio.jpg|thumb|300px|{{center|Tsukamawari No. 4 Kofun Haniwa Group (Restored)}}]] '''Tsukamawari Kofun Group''' (塚廻り古墳群, Tsukamawari Kofun-gun) is a group of [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) located in Ryūmaicho, [[:en:Ōta, Gunma|Ōta, Gunma]], Gunma Prefecture, Japan.Ōtsuka, Hajime; Kobayashi, Saburō; Kumano, Masaya, eds. ''Nihon Kofun Daijiten'' (Japanese Kofun Encyclopedia). Tokyo: Tōkyōdō Shu11an, 1989, 11. 373–374. The No. 4 Kofun is designated as a [[Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site]], while artifacts excavated from the group are designated as [[:en:Important Cultural Property (Japan)|Important Cultural Property (Japan)]]. Currently, the No. 4 Kofun and part of the No. 3 Kofun's front section have been restored and preserved as a kofun park.[http://www.city.ota.gunma.jp/005gyosei/0170-009kyoiku-bunka/bunmazai/otabunka47.html Tsukamawari Kofun Group No. 4 Kofun] - Ōta City Homepage. == Kofun List == {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;background:#ffffff;white-space:nowrap;font-size:85%" |+ !
